# QrCode

A QR code generator component for encoding URLs or text into a scannable QR code image.

## Import

```jsx
import {
  QrCode,
  QrCodeFrame,
  QrCodePattern,
  QrCodeOverlay,
  QrCodeDownloadTrigger,
} from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `QrCode` | The root QR code container. |
| `QrCodeFrame` | The frame/border around the QR code. |
| `QrCodePattern` | The actual QR code pattern (dots/modules). |
| `QrCodeOverlay` | An overlay element in the center of the QR code (e.g., a logo). |
| `QrCodeDownloadTrigger` | A button to download the QR code as an image. |

## Props

### QrCode

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `string` | - | The URL or text to encode into the QR code. |
| `size` | `number` | - | The size of the QR code in pixels. |
| `encoding` | `object` | - | Encoding options for error correction level. |

## Usage

### Basic QR Code

```jsx
<QrCode value="https://example.com">
  <QrCodeFrame>
    <QrCodePattern />
  </QrCodeFrame>
</QrCode>
```

### QR Code with Logo Overlay

```jsx
<QrCode value="https://example.com" size={200}>
  <QrCodeFrame>
    <QrCodePattern />
    <QrCodeOverlay>
      <img src="/logo.png" alt="Logo" width={40} height={40} />
    </QrCodeOverlay>
  </QrCodeFrame>
</QrCode>
```

### Downloadable QR Code

```jsx
<QrCode value="https://example.com">
  <QrCodeFrame>
    <QrCodePattern />
  </QrCodeFrame>
  <QrCodeDownloadTrigger fileName="my-qr-code" mimeType="image/png">
    Download QR
  </QrCodeDownloadTrigger>
</QrCode>
```
